calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-03-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appearing specially for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. Proceedings not reported. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2009 Continued To Mar-03-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $250.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 3/03/2010 at 1:30 PM in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)
